lines.speaker: Slieve
lines.text: Hello. Are you here for my black dragons?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a Slayer assignment to kill those, yes.

lines.speaker: Slieve
lines.text: Fair enough. Do what you have to do.

lines.speaker: Slieve
lines.text: Oh, good. In that case you're welcome to go and admire them, but don't get any ideas about killing them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you here asking about that?

lines.speaker: Slieve
lines.text: Because I like my black dragons, and I had to work hard to get access to their lair, and I don't want people using them for training without a reason.

lines.speaker: Slieve
lines.text: So if one of the Slayer Masters sent you to slay black dragons, that's fine, but otherwise you should go and train elsewhere.

lines.speaker: Slieve
lines.text: I'd rather people didn't train on my dragons at all, but I've got a distant cousin who's a Slayer Master, so I've got to support the family business.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me, I've got to go.

sections.title: When attempting to kill monsters that aren't part of a player's slayer task

lines.speaker: Slieve
lines.text: Hey, go and train somewhere else! I'm not having people mess with my dragons unless a Slayer Master's told them to do it.
